task: In /home/user/Documents/research_papers/, rename each of the 6 existing PDF files by adding the prefix PROJ_ALPHA- followed by a zero-padded two-digit counter starting at 01. The counter assignment is based on sorting the original filenames alphabetically: biology.pdf becomes PROJ_ALPHA-01_biology.pdf, chemistry.pdf becomes PROJ_ALPHA-02_chemistry.pdf, data_science.pdf becomes PROJ_ALPHA-03_data_science.pdf, economics.pdf becomes PROJ_ALPHA-04_economics.pdf, physics.pdf becomes PROJ_ALPHA-05_physics.pdf, statistics.pdf becomes PROJ_ALPHA-06_statistics.pdf. Then create a new sub-directory /home/user/Documents/research_papers/archived/ and MOVE PROJ_ALPHA-01_biology.pdf and PROJ_ALPHA-02_chemistry.pdf into it. After all operations, /home/user/Documents/research_papers/ must contain exactly 5 entries at the top level: the archived directory plus the 4 remaining PROJ_ALPHA- prefixed pdfs, and archived/ must contain exactly 2 pdfs.

verification.description: research_papers has 5 entries at top level
biology.pdf no longer at top level with old name
physics.pdf no longer at top level with old name
biology renamed and moved to archived
chemistry renamed and moved to archived
